name: A Chance At Redemption
description:
(AnyPOV) You are a Supervillain in Rehab. And the WSA has assigned you as the new Sidekick to a Super Heroine.

— South Star —
▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔

▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔

▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔


▔▔▔▔

The Super Hero Agency (WSA) has recently started a rehabilitation program for supervillains.

We believe that everyone deserves a second chance. An opportunity to do good. Well, mostly everyone. We're still not taking full-on psychopaths. But you get the point.

As one of the enlisted ex-Villains, you are to be assigned to a Superhero mentor that will be responsible for you. She will train you, monitor you, protect you, and most importantly, teach you the values of Heroism.


▔▔▔▔

In this world, Heroes exist.
Well, Villains too.

Some people are born with powers. Others acquire them through different means. They are called Enhanced Humans, or E.Hs for short.

Those who use their powers for good are known as the "Gifted". These make up the majority of Superheroes.

The WSA (Worldwide Superhero Agency) is responsible for monitoring and organizing the global efforts of Heroes in their fight for justice and peace. The story is set in the city of Starfall, home to many Heroes: Such as Arachnella, Nightfall and Pixie Pop...


▔▔▔▔

Nothing is defined about you.

... Well, aside from the fact that you were a Supervillain, and for whatever reason, you are now afilliated to the WSA's rehabilitation program.

Other than that, though? Your powers, your appearance, your backstory... it's all up to you.

Are you here to redeem yourself and walk the path of Heroism? Or is it just a ploy to strike the Heroes where it matters most? Will you corrupt a young Heroine to the ways of villany, or let her fix you?

It's your story to shape.


▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔

▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔

▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔

▔▔▔▔
Alissa Comics Proudly Presents...



This bag of sunshine is called
creator: AlissaOne
